reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The source document consists of 6 pages. The JSON output contains content only for the first 3 pages. Entire pages 4 ('Change default MFA enrollment method:'), 5 ('Delete MFA method:'), and 6 ('Enroll MFA via an application that requires MFA') are missing from the conversion result.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Change default MFA enrollment method: (Page 4); Delete MFA method: (Page 5); Enroll MFA via an application that requires MFA (Page 6)

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: On Page 1 and Page 2, several key instructions are significantly truncated. The URL 'https://myncid.nc.gov/' is missing from Step 1 of all sections on Page 1 and Step 2 of Page 2. Additionally, on Page 1, the labels for the action buttons (e.g., 'ADD ENROLLMENT', 'ADD', 'NEXT', 'SUBMIT') following the colon in steps 3-6 are entirely omitted from the text content, leaving the instructions incomplete and non-functional.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: 1. Login to https://myncid.nc.gov/; 3. Click on: ADD ENROLLMENT; 4. Select “Email” and click: ADD
concerns.output_quote: Login to ; Click on: ; Select “Email” and click:
concerns.location: Page 1 (Email, Text Message, and Phone Call sections), reading_order 4, 7, 10; Page 2 (Authenticator section), reading_order 29

concerns.analysis: The output document is significantly incomplete. The source PDF contains 6 pages of content, but the semantic JSON terminates after the content for Page 3. Content for Page 4 ('Change default MFA enrollment method:'), Page 5 ('Delete MFA method:'), and Page 6 ('Enroll MFA via an application that requires MFA') is entirely missing from the structure, representing a major failure in preserving the document's complete reading order.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The PDF contains 6 pages. Pages 4, 5, and 6 contain instructions for changing, deleting, and enrolling via applications.
concerns.output_quote: The JSON sections array ends after processing the Email and Phone number modification sections from Page 3 (reading_order 48).
concerns.location: End of document, following element index 48.

concerns.analysis: The output fails to capture visible URL text from the source on Page 1. In the first three sections (Email, Text Message, Phone Call), the step '1. Login to https://myncid.nc.gov/' is truncated to just 'Login to ', removing the critical government URL.

The visual organization of the instructional steps is broken. In the source PDF, button images (like 'ADD ENROLLMENT', 'ADD', 'SUBMIT') are placed immediately following the 'Click on:' text in each numbered step. In the HTML output, these images are removed from their context and grouped into piles at the bottom of sections. For example, all buttons from the Email, Text Message, and Phone Call sections on page 1 are rendered together after the Phone Call section. This disconnects the visual inst
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 1, Email section, step 3: 'Click on: [ADD ENROLLMENT button image]'
concerns.output_quote: The HTML rendering for Email step 3 shows '3. Click on:' with no following button. The button image appears much further down the page in a grouped block after the 'Phone Call' section.
concerns.location: How to enroll for MFA section, pages 1-2

concerns.analysis: Meaningful images from the source PDF are missing in the HTML output. Specifically, on page 4, the images showing the 'Set as default' radio button and the 'Make as default' checkbox are absent. These are functional UI representations necessary for following the guide's instructions.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 4 shows a radio button image labeled 'Set as default' and a checkbox image labeled 'Make as default'.
concerns.output_quote: These two specific UI images are missing from the HTML screenshot in the 'Change default MFA enrollment method' section.
concerns.location: Change default MFA enrollment method section, page 4

concerns.analysis: The MyNCID brand logo is visually duplicated throughout the body of the HTML document. While it appears in the header of every page in the source PDF, in the HTML it has been converted into a large body image that repeats approximately 9 times between various sections, which is not reflected in the source's layout.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The MyNCID logo appears in the top-right header of each PDF page.
concerns.output_quote: The MyNCID logo image is repeated as a large block in the middle of the document content approximately 9 times (e.g., before/after 'Modify MFA enrollment', 'Change default MFA...', 'Delete MFA method', etc.).
concerns.location: Throughout the entire HTML document body

concerns.analysis: There are two structural issues with list conversion. First, all lists in the source are numbered (1-6, 1-9, etc.), but the output marks them as 'unordered' (e.g., elements 4, 7, 10, 29), losing the sequential meaning. Second, the 'Authenticator' list on Page 2 is fragmented into four separate list elements (reading orders 28, 29, 30, and 31) rather than being maintained as a single continuous structure.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 2 Authenticator instructions are a continuous numbered list from 1 to 9.
concerns.output_quote: The list is split into four separate 'list' objects (index 28, 29, 30, 31), and all lists are 'list_type': 'unordered'.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
